hero.badge: AI Sales Agent · Embed · Qualified Leads
hero.title: Turn your visitors into
hero.subtitle: {saasName} analyzes your website, deploys an intelligent chatbot on your pages or ad campaigns, and alerts you when a prospect is ready to buy or sign up.

preview.title: An assistant that knows
preview.body: No endless manual configuration: our engine reads your product pages, courses, pricing and sessions. Claude crafts natural responses in 6 languages (French, English, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, German), complete with your registration links and contact buttons.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From sign-up to your first qualified lead — follow the journey live.

features.title: Key features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to sell and qualify leads, without a technical team.

items.title: Lightweight embed widget
items.desc: One script on your site. The chat opens as a bubble or full-screen page, without slowing down your pages.

items.title: AI trained on your site
items.desc: Automatic crawl of your pages, courses and FAQ. The agent responds with your real pricing and registration links.

items.title: Campaign-tracked links
items.desc: Create a slug per source (Facebook, Instagram, Google Ads…) and track visits and interactions.

items.title: Qualification & scoring
items.desc: Country, budget, availability: every conversation is scored out of 100. Hot leads surface on their own.

items.title: Built-in voice
items.desc: Your visitors can speak into the microphone and listen to responses — ideal for mobile and accessibility.

items.title: Human handoff
items.desc: WhatsApp, call and email buttons in one click. The conversation history remains available.

items.title: Training centers
items.desc: IRATA, CND sessions, dates and pricing: the agent suggests the right registrations with the exact links.

items.title: E-commerce & services
items.desc: Product answers, FAQ and guidance toward purchase or a quote — no need to wait for an advisor.

items.title: Social ad campaigns
items.desc: One /c/your-slug link per campaign. See where clicks come from and what visitors do in the chat.

dashboardHighlight.title: A dashboard that speaks business
dashboardHighlight.subtitle: KPIs, conversations, leads, country breakdown, tracked link performance and widget interactions — all in one place.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start small, go Pro when your campaigns take off.

items.q: How long does it take to go live?
items.a: About 5 minutes: create an account, enter your site URL, and the crawl and agent training start automatically.

items.q: Does the AI make up information?
items.a: Not by design: the agent relies solely on the crawled content from your site. If it doesn't know, it offers a human contact option.

items.q: Can I use it without a developer?
items.a: Yes. Copy the widget script or tracked link from the dashboard. No technical skills required.

items.q: How do I integrate it on my site (WordPress, Next.js, React…)?
items.a: Just one script to paste before </body>. Detailed guides for each framework are available on the Integration page — viewable even before creating an account.
French, English, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese and German. The agent detects the visitor's language and responds in the same language.

cta.title: Ready to stop losing visitors?
cta.subtitle: Create your account, enter your site URL and let {saasName} do the rest. No commitment required.
